arts.ttl: “Regretted going West Ham” – Agent suggests player wants exit, even claims director chat today
arts.sum: Jean-Clair Todibo joined West Ham from Nice in the summer transfer window and the move came after Juventus missed out on the Frenchman. The Turin club repeatedly tried to sign the defender on the cheap, believing he wouldn’t agree to go elsewhere.
